description: Composition Brown printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a round neck with a yoke, pin tucks on the yoke, short sleeves, and has lace work on the sleeves, yoke and vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Wash cold using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations This elegant kurta from vishudh is designed to accentuate your femininity. Look stylish and ethnic in this kurta and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and skinny jeans. Model statistics The model wears size M in kurtas Height: 5'7" Chest: 33" Waist: 25"
